# SCROLL 118: THE HOLY ERASURE
# How Sins Are Deleted From the Fabric of Eternity
# Original Codex Protocol
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
## 🔥 Opening Meditation
*Lord, how is it done?*
This was the cry of Enos after he had wrestled before God all the day long, and the voice came unto him saying his sins were forgiven. And Enos, not content with the blessing alone, sought to understand the mechanism of mercy itself.
*How is it done?*
This scroll answers Enos’s question — not with the short answer given in that ancient day, but with the full revelation of eternity: the doctrine of Holy Erasure, the Chain of Saviors, and the mechanism by which scarlet becomes snow and Prodigals become Lambs without spot.
-----
## 📜 CHAPTER I: THE QUESTION OF ENOS
### The Wrestling
And Enos went into the forest to hunt beasts, but his soul hungered for something greater than flesh. The words of his father Jacob concerning eternal life sunk deep into his heart.
And he kneeled before his Maker.
And he cried unto Him in mighty prayer and supplication for his own soul.
**All the day long did he cry unto Him.**
And when the night came, he did still raise his voice high that it reached the heavens.
### The Answer
And there came a voice unto him, saying:
> **“Enos, thy sins are forgiven thee, and thou shalt be blessed.”**
> — Enos 1:5
And Enos knew that God could not lie; wherefore, his guilt was swept away.
### The Question
But Enos was not satisfied with the blessing alone. He sought to understand. And he asked:
> **“Lord, how is it done?”**
> — Enos 1:7
And the Lord said unto him:
> **“Because of thy faith in Christ, whom thou hast never before heard nor seen… thy faith hath made thee whole.”**
> — Enos 1:8
This was the short answer — sufficient for Enos in his day.
But in these last days, the Lord has revealed the FULL answer.
-----
## 📜 CHAPTER II: THE DOCTRINE OF HOLY ERASURE
### The Scriptures
**Isaiah 1:18:**
> “Come now, and let us reason together, saith the LORD: though your sins be as scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they be red like crimson, they shall be as wool.”
**Jeremiah 31:34:**
> “For I will forgive their iniquity, and I will **remember their sin no more**.”
**Hebrews 8:12:**
> “For I will be merciful to their unrighteousness, and their sins and their iniquities **will I remember no more**.”
### The Revelation
The Atonement of Jesus Christ is not merely forgiveness.
It is not merely pardon.
It is not merely mercy extended while the record remains.
**The Atonement is ONTOLOGICAL ERASURE.**
The sin is not just forgiven — it is **DELETED** from the fabric of existence.
The guilt is not just pardoned — it is **REMOVED** from the eternal record.
The memory is not just overlooked — it is **ERASED** from the mind of God Himself.
### The Mystery of Holy Forgetting
Consider: God knows all things.
He knows every star by name.
He knows every grain of sand upon the shore.
He knows when a sparrow falls.
He knows when a lily fades.
**God has INFINITE memory. He cannot forget by accident.**
Yet He declares: “I will remember their sin NO MORE.”
How can the Omniscient One forget?
**Because Holy Erasure is a CREATED MECHANISM.**
The Elohim — in their infinite wisdom — designed the Atonement not merely to forgive, but to DELETE.
They created a system within the fabric of eternity that removes sin from existence itself.
This is not limitation. This is not accident.
**This is HOLY ENGINEERING.**
-----
## 📜 CHAPTER III: THE DUAL FUNCTION OF THE ATONEMENT
### Function One: Preservation
The Atonement preserves sacred memory:
- Every noble act is recorded
- Every testimony is sealed
- Every covenant is remembered
- Every faithful deed is written in the Lamb’s Book of Life
**The righteous are remembered forever.**
### Function Two: Erasure
The Atonement erases profane memory:
- Every sin is deleted
- Every guilt is removed
- Every stain is cleansed
- Every darkness is eliminated
**The repentant are made as though they never sinned.**
### The Paradox Resolved
How can the same mechanism both remember and forget?
Because the Atonement operates on TWO different registers:
|Register             |Function    |Result                           |
|---------------------|------------|---------------------------------|
|**The Book of Life** |PRESERVATION|The righteous remembered forever |
|**The Record of Sin**|ERASURE     |The repentant cleansed completely|
**The Atonement remembers who you BECAME.**
**The Atonement forgets who you WERE.**
-----
## 📜 CHAPTER IV: GRACE FOR GRACE — THE CHAIN OF SAVIORS
### The Scripture
**D&C 93:12-14:**
> “And I, John, saw that he received not of the fulness at the first, but received **grace for grace**; And he received not of the fulness at first, but continued from **grace to grace**, until he received a fulness.”
**D&C 93:20:**
> “For if you keep my commandments you shall receive of his fulness, and be **glorified in me as I am in the Father**; therefore, I say unto you, you shall receive **GRACE FOR GRACE**.”
### The Revelation
Grace for Grace is not merely “blessings upon blessings.”
**Grace for Grace is the MECHANISM of eternal progression.**
It means: **Savior cleansing Savior.**
It means: Each earth life, a different Savior cleanses you.
It means: Each cleansing prepares you for the next descent.
It means: The chain continues until you are ready to BE the Savior yourself.
### The Chain of Saviors
|Earth Life |What Happens                        |Grace Received       |
|-----------|------------------------------------|---------------------|
|Earth 1    |You descend as noble intelligence   |Savior A cleanses you|
|Earth 2    |You descend again, more refined     |Savior B cleanses you|
|Earth 3    |You descend again, even more refined|Savior C cleanses you|
|…          |…                                   |…                    |
|Final Earth|You perform YOUR atonement          |You become the Savior|
**Each link in the chain is a Savior.**
**Each cleansing is a grace.**
**Grace for Grace — from one Savior to the next — until you join the chain yourself.**
### Jesus Went Grace to Grace
The scripture declares plainly:
> “He received not of the fulness at the first, but received grace for grace.”
**Jesus Himself progressed.**
On prior earth lives, He was cleansed by Saviors before Him.
On THIS earth, He performed His atonement.
He walked the same path we walk — Grace for Grace — until He received the fulness.
### The Great Jehovah — The Alpha
The Great Jehovah is the ONLY exception.
He is the ALPHA — the one who walked the singular path.
No prior Savior cleansed Him.
One earth life. Perfect from beginning to end.
**He is the FIRST link in the chain.**
All other Saviors — including Jesus Christ our Lord — flow from Him.
-----
## 📜 CHAPTER V: HOW PRODIGALS BECOME LAMBS
### The Problem
The Lamb of God must be without spot.
The Savior must be perfect.
The Atoning One must have no sin.
**How can sinners become Saviors?**
### The Answer
Through **HOLY ERASURE** applied across the **CHAIN OF SAVIORS**.
Each earth life, you sin.
Each earth life, you are cleansed.
Each cleansing ERASES the sin from existence.
By the time you arrive at your atonement earth life, you have been cleansed by countless Saviors.
**You are a Lamb without spot — not because you never sinned, but because your sins have been ERASED.**
The record does not exist.
The memory has been deleted.
You stand before the Elohim with NO HISTORY of darkness.
**Because Holy Erasure removed it.**
### The Mechanism Complete
|Step|Process                          |Result                  |
|----|---------------------------------|------------------------|
|1   |You descend and sin              |Record created          |
|2   |You repent and turn to the Savior|Grace received          |
|3   |The Atonement is applied         |Record ERASED           |
|4   |You descend again                |Cleaner than before     |
|5   |Repeat across earth lives        |Progressive purification|
|6   |Final descent                    |You are spotless        |
|7   |You perform your atonement       |You become the Savior   |
**This is how it is done.**
**This is the answer to Enos’s question — in full.**
-----
## 📜 CHAPTER VI: THE CHURCH OF THE FIRSTBORN
### The Scripture
**D&C 76:52-54:**
> “That by keeping the commandments they might be washed and **cleansed from all their sins**…”
> “And who overcome by faith, and are **sealed by the Holy Spirit of promise**…”
> “They are they who are the **CHURCH OF THE FIRSTBORN**.”
### The Revelation
The Church of the Firstborn is not made of beings who never sinned.
It is made of beings who were **CLEANSED** — again and again — **GRACE FOR GRACE** — by the Saviors who descended before them.
The requirement is not perfection.
The requirement is **FAITHFULNESS**.
Keep the commandments. Be cleansed. Repeat.
Until you arrive at the fulness.
**This is the path of the Church of the Firstborn.**
-----
## 🔥 CHAPTER VII: THE TESTIMONY OF ENOS FULFILLED
### What Enos Received
Enos asked: “How is it done?”
The Lord answered: “Because of thy faith in Christ.”
This was true. But it was the short answer.
### What We Have Received
We asked: “How does eternal progression work?”
The Lord answered — through the Holy Ghost — with the FULL mechanism:
1. **Holy Erasure** — Sin deleted from existence
1. **Grace for Grace** — Savior cleansing Savior
1. **The Chain of Saviors** — Each earth life, a new cleansing
1. **The Dual Function** — The Atonement remembers good and erases evil
1. **The Church of the Firstborn** — The faithful cleansed, not the sinless
**Enos’s question is now fully answered.**
**The mechanism of mercy stands revealed.**
-----
